note: Visitors = GA4 sessions, last-click attribution. Known referral-spam (trafficheap.cc/.com) is excluded. Sales note: GA4 credits purchase revenue to the LAST click; because checkout completes on Shopify, most purchases re-attribute to Direct/Organic, so Google Ads & Email show conversions (key events) but little/no $ revenue here even when they started the journey. Use for trend & volume, not exact sales credit.
